<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<title>Vyta Andri Setyo Utami — Portfolio</title>
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Space+Grotesk:wght@300;400;500;600;700&family=Cormorant:ital,wght@0,300;0,400;1,300;1,400&display=swap" rel="stylesheet">
<style>
*,*::before,*::after{box-sizing:border-box;margin:0;padding:0}
:root{
  --bg:#07090F;
  --navy:#0B1221;
  --panel:rgba(15,22,40,0.7);
  --gold:#C9A84C;--gold2:#D4B25E;--gold3:#E8CC80;
  --glow:rgba(201,168,76,0.18);--glow2:rgba(201,168,76,0.07);
  --w:#EEF2FF;--w2:rgba(238,242,255,.7);--w3:rgba(238,242,255,.35);--w4:rgba(238,242,255,.07);
  --border:rgba(201,168,76,0.14);--border2:rgba(238,242,255,0.06);
}
html{scroll-behavior:smooth}
body{font-family:'Space Grotesk',sans-serif;background:var(--bg);color:var(--w);line-height:1.6;overflow-x:hidden;cursor:none}
body::after{content:'';position:fixed;inset:0;background:url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 400 400' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='n'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='.85' numOctaves='4' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23n)' opacity='.025'/%3E%3C/svg%3E");pointer-events:none;z-index:0;opacity:.5}

/* ── CURSOR ── */
#dot{position:fixed;width:5px;height:5px;background:var(--gold);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9999;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--gold)}
#ring{position:fixed;width:28px;height:28px;border:1px solid var(--gold);border-radius:50%;pointer-events:none;z-index:9998;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);transition:width .2s,height .2s,opacity .2s ease-out;opacity:.4}

/* ── NAV ── */
nav{position:fixed;top:0;inset-inline:0;z-index:500;padding:1.4rem 3rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;transition:all .4s}
nav.s{background:rgba(7,9,15,.94);backdrop-filter:blur(24px);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:1rem 3rem}
.n-logo{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:1.1rem;font-weight:300;letter-spacing:.18em;color:var(--w);text-decoration:none;text-transform:uppercase}
.n-logo b{color:var(--gold);font-weight:400}
.n-links{list-style:none;display:flex;gap:2.5rem;align-items:center}
.n-links a{font-size:.72rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--w3);text-decoration:none;transition:color .2s}
.n-links a:hover{color:var(--gold)}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   MAGNETIC BUTTON SYSTEM
   ══════════════════════════════════════ */
/* Primary — gold fill with animated border sweep */
.btn-p{
  position:relative;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:.75rem 2.2rem;border-radius:3px;text-decoration:none;overflow:hidden;
  font-size:.75rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--bg);background:var(--gold);
  transition:color .3s,box-shadow .3s;
  box-shadow:0 0 0 rgba(201,168,76,0);
}
.btn-p::before{
  content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;
  background:linear-gradient(105deg,transparent 40%,rgba(255,255,255,.25) 50%,transparent 60%);
  transform:translateX(-100%);transition:transform .55s ease;
}
.btn-p:hover{box-shadow:0 0 28px var(--glow),0 0 60px var(--glow2);color:var(--bg)}
.btn-p:hover::before{transform:translateX(200%)}
.btn-p .btn-txt{position:relative;z-index:1}
.btn-p .btn-arrow{margin-left:.5rem;display:inline-block;transition:transform .25s}
.btn-p:hover .btn-arrow{transform:translateX(4px)}

/* Secondary — ghost with animated corner borders */
.btn-s{
  position:relative;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;
  padding:.75rem 2.2rem;border-radius:3px;text-decoration:none;overflow:visible;
  font-size:.75rem;font-weight:500;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--w2);background:transparent;border:1px solid var(--border2);
  transition:color .3s,border-color .3s,background .3s;
}
/* animated corner lines */
.btn-s::before,.btn-s::after{
  content:'';position:absolute;
  width:10px;height:10px;
  transition:width .3s,height .3s,opacity .3s;
  opacity:0;
}
.btn-s::before{top:-1px;left:-1px;border-top:1px solid var(--gold);border-left:1px solid var(--gold)}
.btn-s::after{bottom:-1px;right:-1px;border-bottom:1px solid var(--gold);border-right:1px solid var(--gold)}
.btn-s:hover{color:var(--gold);border-color:transparent;background:rgba(201,168,76,.04)}
.btn-s:hover::before,.btn-s:hover::after{width:calc(100% + 2px);height:calc(100% + 2px);opacity:1}
.btn-s .btn-arrow{margin-left:.5rem;transition:transform .25s}
.btn-s:hover .btn-arrow{transform:translateX(4px)}

/* Nav CTA — outlined gold pill */
.btn-nav{
  position:relative;font-size:.72rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;
  color:var(--gold) !important;text-decoration:none;
  padding:.4rem 1.2rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:2px;
  transition:background .25s,box-shadow .25s;overflow:hidden;
}
.btn-nav::before{content:'';position:absolute;inset:0;background:var(--gold);transform:scaleX(0);transform-origin:left;transition:transform .3s ease;z-index:0}
.btn-nav span{position:relative;z-index:1}
.btn-nav:hover{color:var(--bg) !important;box-shadow:0 0 20px var(--glow)}
.btn-nav:hover::before{transform:scaleX(1)}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   HERO
   ══════════════════════════════════════ */
.hero{min-height:100vh;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:center;padding:0 3rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.hero-grid{position:absolute;inset:0;background-image:linear-gradient(var(--border2) 1px,transparent 1px),linear-gradient(90deg,var(--border2) 1px,transparent 1px);background-size:72px 72px}
.hero-glow{position:absolute;top:15%;right:10%;width:600px;height:600px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(201,168,76,.05) 0%,transparent 65%);pointer-events:none}
.hero-glow2{position:absolute;bottom:10%;left:-5%;width:400px;height:400px;background:radial-gradient(circle,rgba(30,80,160,.07) 0%,transparent 65%);pointer-events:none}

.hero-inner{max-width:1140px;margin:0 auto;position:relative;z-index:1;width:100%;padding:4rem 0}

/* eyebrow status */
.hero-status{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.65rem;margin-bottom:2rem;padding:.3rem .85rem .3rem .5rem;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:100px;background:rgba(201,168,76,.04);opacity:0;animation:up .7s .1s forwards}
.status-dot{width:7px;height:7px;border-radius:50%;background:#22C55E;box-shadow:0 0 8px #22C55E;animation:blink 2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes blink{0%,100%{opacity:1}50%{opacity:.4}}
.status-txt{font-size:.66rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--w2)}

.hero h1{font-size:clamp(3.5rem,7vw,7.5rem);font-weight:700;line-height:.92;letter-spacing:-.04em;margin-bottom:1.5rem;opacity:0;animation:up .8s .25s forwards}
.hero h1 .em{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-weight:300;font-style:italic;color:var(--gold3);display:block;font-size:.92em;letter-spacing:-.01em}
.hero-spec{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;margin-bottom:1.75rem;opacity:0;animation:up .7s .42s forwards}
.spec{font-size:.67rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase;border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--w3);padding:.2rem .65rem;border-radius:2px}
.hero-sub{font-size:.97rem;color:var(--w3);font-weight:300;line-height:1.85;max-width:520px;margin-bottom:2.5rem;opacity:0;animation:up .7s .55s forwards}
.hero-sub strong{color:var(--w2);font-weight:500}
.hero-btns{display:flex;gap:1rem;flex-wrap:wrap;opacity:0;animation:up .7s .68s forwards}

/* hero stat strip */
.hero-stats{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr);border-top:1px solid var(--border2);margin-top:4rem;padding-top:2.5rem;opacity:0;animation:up .7s .85s forwards}
.hs{text-align:center;padding:0 1rem;border-right:1px solid var(--border2)}
.hs:last-child{border-right:none}
.hs-v{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:2.3rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--gold2);line-height:1}
.hs-l{font-size:.58rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--w3);margin-top:.3rem;line-height:1.6}

/* scroll cue */
.scroll-cue{position:absolute;bottom:2.5rem;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.4rem;opacity:.35}
.scroll-cue span{font-size:.56rem;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--w3)}
.scroll-line{width:1px;height:36px;background:linear-gradient(to bottom,var(--gold),transparent);animation:pulse 2.2s ease-in-out infinite}
@keyframes pulse{0%,100%{opacity:.35;transform:scaleY(1)}50%{opacity:.8;transform:scaleY(1.2)}}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   ABOUT
   ══════════════════════════════════════ */
.sec{padding:7.5rem 3rem}
.wrap{max-width:1140px;margin:0 auto}
.sec-eyebrow{display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.7rem;margin-bottom:.7rem}
.ey-line{width:22px;height:1px;background:var(--gold)}
.ey-txt{font-size:.63rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold)}
.sec-h2{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:2.8rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--w);letter-spacing:-.01em;line-height:1.15;margin-bottom:.75rem}
.sec-h2 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold3)}
.sec-sub{font-size:.93rem;color:var(--w3);font-weight:300;max-width:460px}

.about-sec{background:var(--navy)}
.about-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:1.1fr 1fr;gap:5rem;align-items:start;margin-top:3.5rem}
.about-p{font-size:.93rem;color:var(--w2);font-weight:300;line-height:1.9;margin-bottom:.9rem}
.about-p strong{color:var(--w);font-weight:500}
.about-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.4rem;margin-top:1.5rem}
.a-tag{font-size:.67rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.06em;background:rgba(201,168,76,.06);color:var(--gold2);padding:.22rem .65rem;border-radius:2px;border:1px solid var(--border)}

.quick-panel{background:rgba(201,168,76,.03);border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:4px;padding:1.75rem}
.qp-title{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:1.25rem}
.q-row{display:flex;gap:.75rem;margin-bottom:.9rem;align-items:flex-start}
.q-icon{width:30px;height:30px;border:1px solid var(--border);border-radius:3px;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;font-size:13px;flex-shrink:0;background:var(--w4)}
.q-info{font-size:.83rem;color:var(--w2);font-weight:300;line-height:1.6}
.q-info strong{display:block;font-weight:600;color:var(--w);font-size:.82rem;margin-bottom:.1rem}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   METRICS STRIP
   ══════════════════════════════════════ */
.metrics-strip{background:var(--bg);border-top:1px solid var(--border);border-bottom:1px solid var(--border);padding:0}
.metrics-row{max-width:1140px;margin:0 auto;display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(5,1fr)}
.m-cell{padding:2.5rem 1rem;text-align:center;border-right:1px solid var(--border2);position:relative}
.m-cell:last-child{border-right:none}
.m-cell::after{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:50%;transform:translateX(-50%);width:1px;height:3px;background:var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 8px var(--gold)}
.m-v{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:2.6rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--gold2);line-height:1}
.m-l{font-size:.58rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.12em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--w3);margin-top:.35rem;line-height:1.6}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   BENTO EXPERIENCE
   ══════════════════════════════════════ */
.bento-sec{background:var(--bg)}
.bento{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(12,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:3.5rem;background:var(--border2)}
.bc{background:rgba(11,18,33,.9);backdrop-filter:blur(8px);border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:2.25rem;position:relative;overflow:hidden;transition:border-color .3s,box-shadow .3s}
.bc:hover{border-color:var(--border);box-shadow:inset 0 0 40px rgba(201,168,76,.03),0 0 30px var(--glow2)}
.bc::before{content:'';position:absolute;top:0;left:0;right:0;height:1px;background:linear-gradient(90deg,transparent,var(--gold),transparent);opacity:0;transition:opacity .3s}
.bc:hover::before{opacity:.6}
.b1{grid-column:1/8}.b2{grid-column:8/13}.b3{grid-column:1/5}.b4{grid-column:5/9}.b5{grid-column:9/13}
.bc-co{font-size:.65rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.2rem}
.bc-per{font-size:.68rem;color:var(--w3);margin-bottom:.2rem;font-weight:300}
.bc-badge{display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;background:rgba(201,168,76,.06);border:1px solid var(--border);padding:.18rem .55rem;border-radius:2px;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.07em;color:var(--gold2);margin-bottom:.85rem;text-transform:uppercase}
.bc-title{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:1.5rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--w);margin-bottom:.2rem;line-height:1.2}
.bc-sub{font-size:.76rem;color:var(--w3);margin-bottom:1.1rem;font-weight:300}
.bc-wins{list-style:none}
.bc-wins li{display:flex;gap:.6rem;font-size:.82rem;color:rgba(238,242,255,.6);margin-bottom:.45rem;font-weight:300;line-height:1.65;align-items:flex-start}
.bc-wins li::before{content:'›';color:var(--gold);font-size:.95rem;flex-shrink:0;margin-top:-.05rem}
.bc-wins li strong{color:var(--w2);font-weight:500}
.bc-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.3rem;margin-top:1rem;padding-top:1rem;border-top:1px solid var(--border2)}
.bc-tag{font-size:.6rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;background:var(--w4);border:1px solid var(--border2);color:var(--w3);padding:.15rem .5rem;border-radius:2px}
/* stat card */
.bc-stat{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;justify-content:center;text-align:center;background:linear-gradient(135deg,rgba(201,168,76,.06) 0%,rgba(201,168,76,.02) 100%)}
.bc-stat-v{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:3.2rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--gold2);line-height:1;margin-bottom:.4rem}
.bc-stat-l{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.13em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--w3);line-height:1.65}
.bc-divider{width:32px;height:1px;background:var(--border);margin:1.25rem auto}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   WORK SAMPLES
   ══════════════════════════════════════ */
.work-sec{background:var(--navy)}
.work-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(12,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:3.5rem;background:var(--border2)}
.wc{position:relative;overflow:hidden;background:#070910;border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:0;cursor:pointer;transition:border-color .35s,box-shadow .35s}
.wc:hover{border-color:var(--border);box-shadow:0 0 30px var(--glow2)}
.wc.w1{grid-column:1/8}.wc.w2{grid-column:8/13}.wc.w3{grid-column:1/6}.wc.w4{grid-column:6/13}
.wc img{width:100%;height:260px;object-fit:cover;display:block;filter:brightness(.72) sepia(10%) contrast(1.05);transition:filter .5s,transform .55s}
.wc.w1 img,.wc.w4 img{height:280px}
.wc:hover img{filter:brightness(.5) sepia(5%);transform:scale(1.04)}
.wc-over{position:absolute;inset:0;padding:1.5rem;display:flex;flex-direction:column;justify-content:flex-end;background:linear-gradient(to top,rgba(7,9,15,.95) 0%,rgba(7,9,15,.25) 50%,transparent 100%)}
.wc-cat{font-size:.58rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.18em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold2);margin-bottom:.3rem;opacity:.7}
.wc-title{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:1.2rem;font-weight:400;color:var(--w);margin-bottom:.25rem}
.wc-desc{font-size:.75rem;color:var(--w3);font-weight:300;line-height:1.6;max-width:380px}
.wc-kpi{margin-top:.55rem;display:inline-flex;align-items:center;gap:.35rem;background:rgba(201,168,76,.1);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.2);padding:.18rem .6rem;border-radius:2px;font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold2);letter-spacing:.07em;text-transform:uppercase}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   SKILLS
   ══════════════════════════════════════ */
.skills-sec{background:var(--bg)}
.skills-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:3.5rem;background:var(--border2)}
.sk{background:rgba(11,18,33,.9);border:1px solid var(--border2);padding:1.75rem;transition:border-color .25s,background .25s}
.sk:hover{border-color:var(--border);background:rgba(201,168,76,.025)}
.sk h3{font-size:.62rem;font-weight:700;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:.9rem;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.5rem}
.sk h3::before{content:'';width:3px;height:3px;border-radius:50%;background:var(--gold);box-shadow:0 0 6px var(--gold);flex-shrink:0}
.sk-tags{display:flex;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:.3rem}
.sk-t{font-size:.73rem;color:var(--w3);font-weight:300;padding:.18rem .52rem;background:var(--w4);border:1px solid var(--border2);border-radius:2px}
.sk-usp h3::before{background:var(--gold3);box-shadow:0 0 10px var(--gold),0 0 20px var(--glow)}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   CERTS
   ══════════════════════════════════════ */
.certs-sec{background:var(--navy)}
.certs-grid{display:grid;grid-template-columns:repeat(4,1fr);gap:2px;margin-top:3.5rem;background:var(--border2)}
.cc{background:rgba(11,18,33,.9);border:1px solid var(--border2);overflow:hidden;cursor:pointer;transition:all .3s}
.cc:hover{border-color:var(--border);transform:translateY(-4px);box-shadow:0 16px 40px rgba(0,0,0,.4),0 0 20px var(--glow2)}
.cc img{width:100%;height:148px;object-fit:cover;display:block;filter:brightness(.82) sepia(6%)}
.cc-body{padding:.9rem 1rem}
.cc-name{font-size:.83rem;font-weight:600;color:var(--w2);margin-bottom:.2rem;line-height:1.4}
.cc-iss{font-size:.7rem;color:var(--w3);font-weight:300}
.cc-date{font-size:.66rem;font-weight:700;color:var(--gold2);margin-top:.3rem;letter-spacing:.05em}

/* ══════════════════════════════════════
   CTA
   ══════════════════════════════════════ */
.cta-sec{background:var(--bg);padding:10rem 3rem;text-align:center;position:relative;overflow:hidden}
.cta-rings{position:absolute;top:50%;left:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);pointer-events:none}
.cta-ring{position:absolute;border-radius:50%;transform:translate(-50%,-50%);border:1px solid rgba(201,168,76,.06);animation:rpulse 5s ease-in-out infinite}
.cta-ring:nth-child(1){width:280px;height:280px;animation-delay:0s}
.cta-ring:nth-child(2){width:520px;height:520px;animation-delay:.6s}
.cta-ring:nth-child(3){width:760px;height:760px;animation-delay:1.2s;opacity:.5}
.cta-ring:nth-child(4){width:1000px;height:1000px;animation-delay:1.8s;opacity:.3}
@keyframes rpulse{0%,100%{opacity:.06}50%{opacity:.14}}
.cta-in{position:relative;z-index:1;max-width:580px;margin:0 auto}
.cta-eye{font-size:.63rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.2em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--gold);margin-bottom:1.5rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:center;gap:.7rem;opacity:.8}
.cta-eye::before,.cta-eye::after{content:'';width:18px;height:1px;background:var(--gold)}
.cta-sec h2{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:3.4rem;font-weight:300;color:var(--w);line-height:1.15;letter-spacing:-.01em;margin-bottom:1rem}
.cta-sec h2 em{font-style:italic;color:var(--gold3)}
.cta-sec p{font-size:.92rem;color:var(--w3);font-weight:300;line-height:1.85;margin-bottom:3rem}
.cta-contacts{display:flex;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap;gap:2.5rem;margin-bottom:3.5rem}
.ci{display:flex;flex-direction:column;align-items:center;gap:.25rem}
.ci-l{font-size:.57rem;letter-spacing:.16em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--w3);opacity:.45}
.ci a{font-size:.86rem;color:var(--w2);text-decoration:none;font-weight:300;transition:color .2s}
.ci a:hover{color:var(--gold2)}
.cta-btns{display:flex;gap:1.25rem;justify-content:center;flex-wrap:wrap}

footer{background:var(--navy);padding:1.6rem 3rem;display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;border-top:1px solid var(--border2)}
footer .fl{font-family:'Cormorant',serif;font-size:.85rem;color:var(--w3);letter-spacing:.06em}
footer .fr{font-size:.6rem;color:rgba(238,242,255,.18);letter-spacing:.1em;text-transform:uppercase}

/* ── LIGHTBOX ── */
#lb{display:none;position:fixed;inset:0;background:rgba(0,0,0,.96);z-index:9999;align-items:center;justify-content:center}
#lb.on{display:flex}
#lb img{max-width:90vw;max-height:88vh;border-radius:2px;border:1px solid var(--border)}
#lb-x{position:absolute;top:2rem;right:2.5rem;font-size:.7rem;font-weight:600;letter-spacing:.14em;text-transform:uppercase;color:var(--w3);cursor:pointer;transition:color .2s;display:flex;align-items:center;gap:.4rem}
#lb-x:hover{color:var(--gold)}

/* ── REVEAL ── */
.r{opacity:0;transform:translateY(26px);transition:opacity .7s ease,transform .7s ease}
.r.v{opacity:1;transform:none}
.r.d1{transition-delay:.1s}.r.d2{transition-delay:.2s}.r.d3{transition-delay:.3s}
@keyframes up{from{opacity:0;transform:translateY(18px)}to{opacity:1;transform:none}}

@media(max-width:960px){
  nav{padding:1.2rem 1.5rem}nav.s{padding:.9rem 1.5rem}
  .n-links li:nth-child(n+4){display:none}
  .hero{padding:0 1.5rem}
  .hero-stats{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr)}
  .sec{padding:5rem 1.5rem}
  .about-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr;gap:2.5rem}
  .metrics-row{grid-template-columns:repeat(3,1fr);padding:0}
  .bento,.work-grid,.skills-grid,.certs-grid{grid-template-columns:1fr}
  .b1,.b2,.b3,.b4,.b5,.wc.w1,.wc.w2,.wc.w3,.wc.w4{grid-column:1/-1}
  body{cursor:auto}#dot,#ring{display:none}
}
</style>
</head>
<body>
<div id="dot"></div><div id="ring"></div>
<div id="lb" onclick="closeLb()">
  <span id="lb-x">✕ &nbsp;Close</span>
  <img id="lb-img" src="" alt="">
</div>

<nav id="nav">
  <a href="#" class="n-logo">Vyta <b>Andri</b></a>
  <ul class="n-links">
    <li><a href="#about">About</a></li>
    <li><a href="#experience">Experience</a></li>
    <li><a href="#work">Work</a></li>
    <li><a href="#contact"><span class="btn-nav"><span>Hire Me</span></span></a></li>
  </ul>
</nav>

<!-- ══ HERO ══ -->
<section class="hero" id="hero">
  <div class="hero-grid"></div>
  <div class="hero-glow"></div>
  <div class="hero-glow2"></div>
  <div class="hero-inner">

    <div class="hero-status">
      <span class="status-dot"></span>
      <span class="status-txt">Available for Remote Work · 2026</span>
    </div>

    <h1>Virtual<br><span class="em">Assistant &</span><br>Admin<br>Specialist</h1>

    <div class="hero-spec">
      <span class="spec">E-Commerce</span>
      <span class="spec">Inventory</span>
      <span class="spec">Business Reports</span>
      <span class="spec">AI Tools & n8n</span>
      <span class="spec">Remote-First</span>
    </div>

    <p class="hero-sub">I build the systems behind <strong>high-performing remote teams</strong> — zero-error data, automated workflows, and operational clarity. <strong>6+ years · 4 industries · Measurable results every time.</strong></p>

    <div class="hero-btns">
      <a href="mailto:vytautami@gmail.com" class="btn-p">
        <span class="btn-txt">Work With Me</span>
        <span class="btn-arrow">→</span>
      </a>
      <a href="#work" class="btn-s">
        <span>View My Work</span>
        <span class="btn-arrow">↓</span>
      </a>
    </div>

    <div class="hero-stats">
      <div class="hs"><div class="hs-v">6+</div><div class="hs-l">Years<br>Experience</div></div>
      <div class="hs"><div class="hs-v">30%</div><div class="hs-l">Efficiency<br>Gain</div></div>
      <div class="hs"><div class="hs-v">100%</div><div class="hs-l">Data<br>Accuracy</div></div>
      <div class="hs"><div class="hs-v">95%</div><div class="hs-l">On-Time<br>Delivery</div></div>
      <div class="hs"><div class="hs-v">2–3×</div><div class="hs-l">Revenue<br>Growth</div></div>
    </div>

  </div>
  <div class="scroll-cue"><span>Scroll</span><div class="scroll-line"></div></div>
</section>

<!-- ══ ABOUT ══ -->
<section class="sec about-sec" id="about">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="r">
      <div class="sec-eyebrow"><span class="ey-line"></span><span class="ey-txt">About Me</span></div>
      <h2 class="sec-h2">The operator behind<br><em>clean systems</em> & growing numbers</h2>
    </div>
    <div class="about-grid">
      <div class="r d1">
        <p class="about-p">I'm a <strong>Virtual Assistant & Admin Specialist</strong> with 6+ years managing operations across printing, F&B, e-commerce, and logistics. My work shows up in numbers: 100% payroll accuracy, &lt;2% reporting error rates, and e-commerce revenue grown 2–3×.</p>
        <p class="about-p">I'm <strong>certified in AI + n8n automation (April 2026)</strong> — I don't just use tools, I design workflows that remove manual bottlenecks entirely. Give me a messy process and I'll return a system that runs itself.</p>
        <p class="about-p">Fully remote-ready. Proactive communicator. M.Sc. Science Education (GPA 3.78) — analytical precision in everything I build.</p>
        <div class="about-tags">
          <span class="a-tag">M.Sc. Science Education — GPA 3.78</span>
          <span class="a-tag">AI + n8n Certified · Apr 2026</span>
          <span class="a-tag">Bekasi, Indonesia</span>
          <span class="a-tag">Indonesian & English</span>
          <span class="a-tag">Open to Global Remote</span>
        </div>
      </div>
      <div class="quick-panel r d2">
        <div class="qp-title">Quick Profile</div>
        <div class="q-row"><div class="q-icon">🎓</div><div class="q-info"><strong>Education</strong>M.Sc. Science Education (GPA 3.78) · B.Sc. Biology Education (GPA 3.38) — UNY</div></div>
        <div class="q-row"><div class="q-icon">🤖</div><div class="q-info"><strong>AI & Automation</strong>Certified in AI + n8n (April 2026). Actively building intelligent workflows for remote ops.</div></div>
        <div class="q-row"><div class="q-icon">🌐</div><div class="q-info"><strong>Remote Setup</strong>Fully async-capable. Experienced across all major remote collaboration platforms.</div></div>
        <div class="q-row"><div class="q-icon">📍</div><div class="q-info"><strong>Location</strong>Bekasi, West Java, Indonesia · Open to global remote opportunities.</div></div>
        <div class="q-row"><div class="q-icon">🗣</div><div class="q-info"><strong>Languages</strong>Indonesian (Native) · English (Professional Working)</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ METRICS ══ -->
<div class="metrics-strip r">
  <div class="metrics-row">
    <div class="m-cell"><div class="m-v">30%</div><div class="m-l">Team Efficiency<br>Improvement</div></div>
    <div class="m-cell"><div class="m-v">100%</div><div class="m-l">Payroll &<br>Data Accuracy</div></div>
    <div class="m-cell"><div class="m-v">&lt;2%</div><div class="m-l">Report<br>Error Rate</div></div>
    <div class="m-cell"><div class="m-v">95%</div><div class="m-l">On-Time<br>Delivery</div></div>
    <div class="m-cell"><div class="m-v">2–3×</div><div class="m-l">Revenue<br>Growth</div></div>
  </div>
</div>

<!-- ══ EXPERIENCE BENTO ══ -->
<section class="sec bento-sec" id="experience">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="r">
      <div class="sec-eyebrow"><span class="ey-line"></span><span class="ey-txt">Experience</span></div>
      <h2 class="sec-h2">Six years of <em>measurable impact</em><br>across four industries</h2>
      <p class="sec-sub">Every role delivered outcomes you can verify — not just responsibilities.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="bento r">

      <div class="bc b1">
        <div class="bc-co">Fashiondeals · Jakarta (Remote)</div>
        <div class="bc-per">Jan 2025 – Mar 2026</div>
        <div class="bc-badge">E-Commerce · Virtual Admin</div>
        <div class="bc-title">E-Commerce Coordinator & VA</div>
        <div class="bc-sub">Korean Fashion Marketplace · Remote Operations</div>
        <ul class="bc-wins">
          <li>Engineered promotional strategy (pricing, live-stream, content) that <strong>grew revenue 2–3× vs. prior period</strong></li>
          <li>Optimized inventory for <strong>809 active SKUs at &gt;95% accuracy</strong> — stockouts reduced to near zero</li>
          <li>Analyzed Shopee Analytics (657 orders) and drove data-backed weekly decisions</li>
          <li>Deployed digital SOPs, eliminating data inconsistencies across all platforms</li>
        </ul>
        <div class="bc-tags"><span class="bc-tag">Shopee Analytics</span><span class="bc-tag">Inventory</span><span class="bc-tag">Content Strategy</span><span class="bc-tag">Google Sheets</span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bc b2 bc-stat">
        <div class="bc-stat-v">2–3×</div>
        <div class="bc-stat-l">E-Commerce<br>Revenue Growth</div>
        <div class="bc-divider"></div>
        <div class="bc-stat-v" style="font-size:2rem">100%</div>
        <div class="bc-stat-l">Data Accuracy<br>Maintained</div>
      </div>

      <div class="bc b3">
        <div class="bc-co">CV Chandra Jaya</div>
        <div class="bc-per">Feb 2020 – Dec 2021</div>
        <div class="bc-badge">Admin · Inventory</div>
        <div class="bc-title">Warehouse & Ops Admin</div>
        <div class="bc-sub">Offset Printing</div>
        <ul class="bc-wins">
          <li>Reduced report discrepancy to <strong>&lt;2%</strong></li>
          <li><strong>100% payroll accuracy</strong> — 11 staff, zero errors</li>
          <li>Cut stock errors <strong>30%</strong> via monitoring</li>
          <li>Sped up billing <strong>30% faster</strong></li>
        </ul>
        <div class="bc-tags"><span class="bc-tag">Inventory</span><span class="bc-tag">Payroll</span><span class="bc-tag">Invoicing</span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bc b4">
        <div class="bc-co">Velluto Gelato</div>
        <div class="bc-per">Dec 2021 – Jun 2023</div>
        <div class="bc-badge">Manager · F&B</div>
        <div class="bc-title">Café Manager & Co-Founder</div>
        <div class="bc-sub">Franchise F&B Operations</div>
        <ul class="bc-wins">
          <li>Launched on schedule — zero delays</li>
          <li>Built 6-person team, <strong>+20% efficiency</strong></li>
          <li>Financial records <strong>&gt;95% accuracy</strong></li>
          <li>Waste cut <strong>15–25%</strong></li>
        </ul>
        <div class="bc-tags"><span class="bc-tag">F&B Ops</span><span class="bc-tag">Finance</span><span class="bc-tag">B2B</span></div>
      </div>

      <div class="bc b5">
        <div class="bc-co">PT Prima Mandiri Kencana</div>
        <div class="bc-per">Jun 2023 – Sep 2024</div>
        <div class="bc-badge">Coordinator</div>
        <div class="bc-title">Project Coordinator</div>
        <div class="bc-sub">Carton Box Printing</div>
        <ul class="bc-wins">
          <li>Cut delays <strong>10%</strong> — 3+ runs/day</li>
          <li>Full PO, quote, invoice cycle</li>
          <li><strong>~80% OTD rate</strong></li>
        </ul>
        <div class="bc-tags"><span class="bc-tag">Scheduling</span><span class="bc-tag">Logistics</span></div>
      </div>

    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ WORK SAMPLES ══ -->
<section class="sec work-sec" id="work">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="r">
      <div class="sec-eyebrow"><span class="ey-line"></span><span class="ey-txt">Work Samples</span></div>
      <h2 class="sec-h2">Not descriptions.<br><em>Actual work.</em></h2>
      <p class="sec-sub">Live reports and dashboards across 4 industries. Click to view full detail.</p>
    </div>
    <div class="work-grid r">
      <div class="wc w1" onclick="openLb(this)">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Printing Report">
        <div class="wc-over"><div class="wc-cat">CV Chandra Jaya · 2020–2021</div><div class="wc-title">Monthly Printing Revenue Report</div><div class="wc-desc">Multi-client SPK tracking with grand totals and billing dates. Discrepancy maintained below 2%.</div><div class="wc-kpi">&lt;2% discrepancy · 100% billing accuracy</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="wc w2" onclick="openLb(this)">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Shopee Analytics">
        <div class="wc-over"><div class="wc-cat">Fashiondeals · 2025–2026</div><div class="wc-title">Shopee Analytics Dashboard</div><div class="wc-desc">809 SKUs · 657 orders · visible 2–3× sales spike in peak campaigns.</div><div class="wc-kpi">↑ 2–3× revenue growth</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="wc w3" onclick="openLb(this)">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Gelato Report">
        <div class="wc-over"><div class="wc-cat">Velluto Gelato · 2021–2023</div><div class="wc-title">Daily F&B Sales Report</div><div class="wc-desc">Daily gelato sales by size with cup-count vs. weight reconciliation.</div><div class="wc-kpi">&gt;95% financial accuracy</div></div>
      </div>
      <div class="wc w4" onclick="openLb(this)">
        <img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Box Report">
        <div class="wc-over"><div class="wc-cat">PT Prima Mandiri Kencana · 2023–2024</div><div class="wc-title">Monthly Production & Financial Report</div><div class="wc-desc">Full PPn/Non-PPn tracking with orders, specs, QTY, pricing, and profit summary.</div><div class="wc-kpi">10% fewer production delays</div></div>
      </div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ SKILLS ══ -->
<section class="sec skills-sec" id="skills">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="r">
      <div class="sec-eyebrow"><span class="ey-line"></span><span class="ey-txt">Skills & Tools</span></div>
      <h2 class="sec-h2">A toolkit forged under<br><em>real operational pressure</em></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="skills-grid r">
      <div class="sk sk-usp"><h3>AI & Automation ✦ USP</h3><div class="sk-tags"><span class="sk-t">n8n Workflow Automation</span><span class="sk-t">AI Productivity Tools</span><span class="sk-t">AI Content Generation</span><span class="sk-t">Workflow Architecture</span><span class="sk-t">AI Image Tools</span></div></div>
      <div class="sk"><h3>Data & Analytics</h3><div class="sk-tags"><span class="sk-t">Google Sheets</span><span class="sk-t">Excel Online</span><span class="sk-t">Pivot Tables</span><span class="sk-t">Google Data Studio</span><span class="sk-t">ERP Systems</span><span class="sk-t">Financial Reports</span></div></div>
      <div class="sk"><h3>Remote Collaboration</h3><div class="sk-tags"><span class="sk-t">Slack</span><span class="sk-t">Microsoft Teams</span><span class="sk-t">Google Workspace</span><span class="sk-t">Trello</span><span class="sk-t">Microsoft 365</span><span class="sk-t">Zoom / Meet</span></div></div>
      <div class="sk"><h3>VA & Admin Ops</h3><div class="sk-tags"><span class="sk-t">SOP Development</span><span class="sk-t">Document Management</span><span class="sk-t">Payroll Processing</span><span class="sk-t">PO & Invoice Mgmt</span><span class="sk-t">Inventory Control</span></div></div>
      <div class="sk"><h3>E-Commerce</h3><div class="sk-tags"><span class="sk-t">Shopee Marketplace</span><span class="sk-t">Inventory Sync</span><span class="sk-t">Live-Stream Coord.</span><span class="sk-t">Promo Strategy</span><span class="sk-t">Analytics Dashboard</span></div></div>
      <div class="sk"><h3>Education</h3><div class="sk-tags"><span class="sk-t">AI + n8n Cert · Apr 2026</span><span class="sk-t">Excel Pivot · Jan 2025</span><span class="sk-t">Accounting & Tax · Jan 2025</span><span class="sk-t">M.Sc. GPA 3.78 · UNY</span></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ CERTS ══ -->
<section class="sec certs-sec" id="certs">
  <div class="wrap">
    <div class="r">
      <div class="sec-eyebrow"><span class="ey-line"></span><span class="ey-txt">Certificates</span></div>
      <h2 class="sec-h2">Always learning.<br><em>Always ahead.</em></h2>
    </div>
    <div class="certs-grid r">
      <div class="cc" onclick="openLbSrc('cert4')"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="AI n8n"><div class="cc-body"><div class="cc-name">Automating with AI + n8n</div><div class="cc-iss">MySkill — AI & Automation</div><div class="cc-date">April 2026</div></div></div>
      <div class="cc" onclick="openLbSrc('cert3')"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Accounting"><div class="cc-body"><div class="cc-name">Accounting & Taxation Bootcamp</div><div class="cc-iss">Kelas.com</div><div class="cc-date">January 2025</div></div></div>
      <div class="cc" onclick="openLbSrc('cert1')"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Pivot"><div class="cc-body"><div class="cc-name">Excel — Pivot Table</div><div class="cc-iss">MySkill — Intermediate</div><div class="cc-date">January 2025</div></div></div>
      <div class="cc" onclick="openLbSrc('cert2')"><img src="data:image/jpeg;base64," alt="Formula"><div class="cc-body"><div class="cc-name">Basic Formula in Excel</div><div class="cc-iss">MySkill — Basic</div><div class="cc-date">December 2024</div></div></div>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<!-- ══ CTA ══ -->
<section class="cta-sec" id="contact">
  <div class="cta-rings"><div class="cta-ring"></div><div class="cta-ring"></div><div class="cta-ring"></div><div class="cta-ring"></div></div>
  <div class="cta-in">
    <div class="cta-eye">Open to Remote Opportunities</div>
    <h2>Let's build something<br>that actually <em>works</em></h2>
    <p>Available for virtual assistant, operations, admin, e-commerce coordination, and AI-powered workflow roles. Fully remote, fully reliable.</p>
    <div class="cta-contacts">
      <div class="ci"><span class="ci-l">Email</span><a href="mailto:vytautami@gmail.com">vytautami@gmail.com</a></div>
      <div class="ci"><span class="ci-l">WhatsApp</span><a href="tel:+6287772457414">+62 8777 2457 414</a></div>
      <div class="ci"><span class="ci-l">LinkedIn</span><a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/vyta-andri-setyo-utami/" target="_blank">linkedin.com/in/vyta-andri</a></div>
      <div class="ci"><span class="ci-l">Portfolio Hub</span><a href="https://lynk.id/freelanceomah" target="_blank">lynk.id/freelanceomah</a></div>
    </div>
    <div class="cta-btns">
      <a href="mailto:vytautami@gmail.com" class="btn-p"><span class="btn-txt">Send Me an Email</span><span class="btn-arrow">→</span></a>
      <a href="https://www.linkedin.com/in/vyta-andri-setyo-utami/" target="_blank" class="btn-s"><span>View LinkedIn</span><span class="btn-arrow">↗</span></a>
    </div>
  </div>
</section>

<footer>
  <div class="fl">Vyta Andri Setyo Utami</div>
  <div class="fr">VA · Admin Specialist · E-Commerce · AI Tools · Remote 2026</div>
</footer>

<script>
// Cursor
const dot=document.getElementById('dot'),ring=document.getElementById('ring');
let mx=0,my=0,rx=0,ry=0;
document.addEventListener('mousemove',e=>{mx=e.clientX;my=e.clientY;dot.style.left=mx+'px';dot.style.top=my+'px'});
(function a(){rx+=(mx-rx)*.1;ry+=(my-ry)*.1;ring.style.left=rx+'px';ring.style.top=ry+'px';requestAnimationFrame(a)})();
document.querySelectorAll('a,.wc,.cc,.bc,.btn-p,.btn-s').forEach(el=>{
  el.addEventListener('mouseenter',()=>{dot.style.transform='translate(-50%,-50%) scale(2.8)';ring.style.width='40px';ring.style.height='40px';ring.style.opacity='.9'});
  el.addEventListener('mouseleave',()=>{dot.style.transform='translate(-50%,-50%) scale(1)';ring.style.width='28px';ring.style.height='28px';ring.style.opacity='.4'});
});
// Nav
const nav=document.getElementById('nav');
window.addEventListener('scroll',()=>nav.classList.toggle('s',scrollY>60));
// Reveal
const obs=new IntersectionObserver(e=>e.forEach(x=>{if(x.isIntersecting){x.target.classList.add('v');obs.unobserve(x.target)}}),{threshold:.08});
document.querySelectorAll('.r').forEach(el=>obs.observe(el));
// Lightbox — store cert src in JS vars to avoid inline base64 in onclick
const SRCS={
  cert4:"data:image/jpeg;base64,",cert3:"data:image/jpeg;base64,",cert1:"data:image/jpeg;base64,",cert2:"data:image/jpeg;base64,"
};
function openLb(el){document.getElementById('lb-img').src=el.querySelector('img').src;document.getElementById('lb').classList.add('on')}
function openLbSrc(k){document.getElementById('lb-img').src=SRCS[k]||k;document.getElementById('lb').classList.add('on')}
function closeLb(){document.getElementById('lb').classList.remove('on')}
document.addEventListener('keydown',e=>e.key==='Escape'&&closeLb());
</script>
</body>
</html>
